variant: split-gate (ASM-0421 shape+entity-gated / concept-label descriptive); a5 audit is genuinely PRE-DATA (corrected gate applied from the start, design doc 14.3). Covered-only sample over the CURRENT eval.jsonl (post instance-true EVAL-DIVERSITY re-authoring).
sample_rule: deterministic round-robin over the 9 a5 covered families in eval appearance order (callers-of, callees-of, where-defined, imports-of, imported-by, contains, contained-in, instance-true, instance-false-disjoint), first 60 covered items. No FK-NLB-10 scope cut on a5 (that fork is l3a-only).

descriptive_strict_recovery.note: concept-label recovery (is-a items) is DESCRIPTIVE under ASM-0421.

match_rule: shape==exact; entity case/hyphen/space-insensitive (substring-tolerant); concept up-to-inflection stem-overlap (descriptive)
expectation_note: designer expectation (assessment a5_audit_expectation) was that a5 op frames are direction-marked in English with no l3a cardinality trap; MEASURED: 59/60 shape+entity, the single miss a0350 is an imports-of/imported-by converse flip (entity recovered), the sole converse confusion.
